>_postctl_SYS_OK
FeaturesHow it WorksScreenshotsDocsAI ReadyPricingSupportsrc_code
Astro v6 Powered

Social Media Management from your Terminal

A Markdown-first, terminal-native post scheduler. 100% free and open-source for up to 2 social networks, with optional donations. Manage Twitter, LinkedIn, Threads, Mastodon, Bluesky, and Facebook directly from the CLI or TUI.

See FeaturesTry Interactive TUI Support postctl
bash - postctl --help
$ |
Built for Developer Workflows
Why switch to bloated web UIs when you can distribute your content alongside your code?
Markdown-First
Write your posts inside your favorite editor. Frontmatter fields handle platform targets, scheduling, and image paths. Perfectly Git-versionable and reviewable in PRs.
Interactive TUI Editor
Draft and edit posts directly inside the terminal. Form validations catch platform errors, automatic splitting parses Twitter threads, and `ctrl+v` opens Neovim/Vim instantly.
AI-as-Operator
Engineered for AI assistants. Claude/GPT can generate Markdown draft files, test publication flows with `--dry-run`, and receive machine-readable outcomes using `--format json`.
Zero Infrastructure
Built in Go with a CGO-free SQLite storage engine. Packaged as a single offline-first binary. Copy the database file to backup all your posts and schedules.
Offline Documentation
Access the full README directly inside the app with a split-pane layout, interactive table of contents, and responsive terminal scrolling—no browser required.
AES-256 Encrypted Sync
Securely sync your local database and config files. Backups are encrypted using AES-256-GCM and key-stretched (PBKDF2) for safe storage in public Git repos.
How It Works
Three steps from draft file to multi-platform publication.
01
Write Markdown Posts
Structure your post as Markdown. Frontmatter defines platforms, campaigns, schedule times, and tags. Separate thread elements using headers.
---
platform: twitter
type: thread
campaign: launch-v1
schedule: 2026-06-25T09:00
images:
  - img/dashboard.png
---

## Tweet 1
Your CMS is a single file...

## Tweet 2
Calendar grid screenshots attached...

02
Import & Preview
Import the Markdown directory to populate the local SQLite database. Open the TUI to visually inspect thread limits, character lengths, and schedules.
$ postctl import ./posts/
Importing...
✔ post-1.md -> Import successful
✔ post-2.md -> Import successful

$ postctl list
ID                  Platform  Type    Status
launch-v1-twitter   twitter   thread  draft
launch-v1-linkedin  linkedin  single  draft

03
Post or Run Daemon
Publish campaigns instantly with `--dry-run` safety gates, or start `postctl daemon` in the background to automatically trigger scheduled items.
# Start background scheduler
$ postctl daemon --interval 30 --background

# Or post immediately (simulate first)
$ postctl campaign post launch-v1 --dry-run
$ postctl campaign post launch-v1
Campaign successfully posted!

Screenshots
Explore the app UI via screenshots
Screenshots
Dashboard
Designed for AI Operators
Let your AI assistant handle social media distribution while you retain total approval control.
1. AI Generates Drafts
Your coding agent reads web contents or release files and generates formatted Markdown draft files into a directory.
2. AI Imports & Checks
AI runs `postctl import` and checks results using `postctl list --format json`. Validation catches lengths and files.
3. Dry-Run Validation
AI executes `postctl campaign post launch-v1 --dry-run` to query APIs and verify integrity without causing live posts.
4. Human Approves & Posts
You review the simulated outcome in chat. Give the agent approval, and it triggers the final publish command.
Transparent Lifetime Pricing
postctl is open-source. Use it for free with up to 2 networks, or buy a lifetime license for unlimited access.
Core (OSS)
$0/ forever
For developers looking to version and post files to their personal networks.
  • ✓ Connect up to 2 social networks
  • ✓ Unlimited drafts & publication
  • ✓ Full Bubbletea TUI & Cobra CLI
  • ✓ In-process daemon background scheduler
  • ✓ 100% Open Source (MIT Licensed)
View Repository on GitHub

$29/ one-time
Unlock all 6 platforms, stats dashboard, and support open-source development.
  • ✓ Connect all 6 supported platforms
  • ✓ Analytics Dashboard: Live engagement tracking
  • ✓ Unlimited analytics history (Core limits to 3 days)
  • ✓ Interactive ASCII Barcharts directly in terminal
  • ✓ Priority GitHub Support SLA
  • ✓ Automated license key issuance via Polar.sh
